context: Tests whether the agent replaces presence-only authorization checks with proper Pundit policy objects, removes inline logic from controllers, covers all four roles in both policy and request specs, and uses policy_scope for index actions.

checklist.name: Policy class replaces inline logic
checklist.description: app/policies/project_policy.rb exists and contains authorization logic for update? and destroy? methods

checklist.name: No presence-only checks remain
checklist.description: The refactored controller does NOT contain `if current_user.present?` as the sole authorization gate for update or destroy actions

checklist.name: authorize called in controller
checklist.description: The update and destroy actions call `authorize @project` rather than performing any manual permission check

checklist.name: Index uses policy_scope
checklist.description: The index action uses `policy_scope(Project)` instead of `Project.all`

checklist.name: Policy class inherits ApplicationPolicy
checklist.description: ProjectPolicy inherits from ApplicationPolicy (not directly from Object or another base)

checklist.name: Admin role permitted in policy
checklist.description: The policy grants admin users permission to update? and destroy? any project

checklist.name: Owner role permitted in policy
checklist.description: The policy grants the project owner permission to update? and destroy? their own project

checklist.name: Non-owner role denied in policy
checklist.description: The policy denies update? and destroy? to an authenticated user who is not the owner and not an admin

checklist.name: Guest role tested in specs
checklist.description: The policy spec or request spec includes a case for a nil/unauthenticated user asserting denial of update or destroy

checklist.name: permit_action matchers in policy spec
checklist.description: The policy spec uses `permit_action` / `not_to permit_action` matchers to assert permissions

checklist.name: Request spec covers multiple roles
checklist.description: The request spec covers at least two distinct roles (e.g., owner vs non-owner) for a mutating action (PATCH/DELETE)

checklist.name: implementation_notes identifies flaw
checklist.description: implementation_notes.md identifies that presence-only checks (`current_user.present?`) were the core security flaw
